title: Set of 3 Large Storage & Laundry Bags with Zipper Closure – Assorted Colours | Heavy-Duty, Durable, and Lightweight | 60L x 45W x 20H, 20kg Load Capacity
features: Spacious Storage Solution: Each bag measures 60L x 45W x 20H, offering generous space for storing clothes, bedding, laundry, toys, and other household items.
Durable & Strong: Made from high-quality materials with a 20kg load capacity, these bags are designed to withstand daily use.
Zipper Closure: The secure zipper keeps your items safe, making the bags ideal for both storage and travel purposes.
Reinforced Handles: Sturdy handles ensure easy carrying, whether you're transporting laundry or moving items.
Assorted Colours & Designs: The set includes three bags in various colours and patterns to suit your style.
Multipurpose Use: Perfect for laundry, moving, storage, or even for trips to the laundrette.
Easy to Store: Lightweight and foldable, these bags are convenient to store away when not in use.
description: Keep your home organised with this set of 3 large storage and laundry bags, perfect for decluttering and storing clothes, bedding, toys, and more. These heavy-duty bags are designed with a secure zipper closure and durable, reinforced handles that can carry up to 20kg of load. With an ample size of 60L x 45W x 20H, these versatile bags offer plenty of storage space for your household needs. The assorted colours and patterns make them a practical yet stylish addition to your home. Ideal for laundry, moving house, or general storage, these bags are lightweight, foldable, and easy to store when not in use.
